popularStory.headline: Eustace III (died c. 1125)
popularStory.description:
Eustace III (died c. 1125) was the count of Boulogne from 1087, succeeding his father Count Eustace II. His mother was Ida of Lorraine.

In 1088, Eustace supported the rebellion against William II of …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Eustache III de Boulogne於大約1058年1月出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德盧馬利--坎布雷希斯時，他的父親Eustache II de Boulogne39歲，母親Ide de Lorraine29歲。他於大約1102年與Mary of Scotland在法國帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1125年1月25日在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eustache III de Boulogne于大约1058年1月出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德盧馬利--坎布雷希斯时，他的父亲Eustache II de Boulogne39岁，母亲Ide de Lorraine29岁。他于大约1102年与Mary of Scotland在法国帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1125年1月25日在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eustache
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Eustache III de Boulogne was born about January 1058, in Rumilly-en-Cambrésis, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Eustache II de Boulogne, was 39 and his mother, Ide de Lorraine, was 29. He married Mary of Scotland about 1102, in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 25 January 1125, in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eustache III de Boulogne est né environ janvier 1058, à Rumilly-en-Cambrésis, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Eustache II de Boulogne, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Ide de Lorraine, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Mary of Scotland environ 1102, à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 janvier 1125, à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eustache III de Boulogne um Januar 1058 in Rumilly-en-Cambrésis, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eustache II de Boulogne 39 und seine Mutter Ide de Lorraine 29. Er hat um 1102 in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich Mary of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. Januar 1125 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eustache III de Boulogne è nato il circa gennaio 1058 nel Rumilly-en-Cambrésis, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Eustache II de Boulogne, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Ide de Lorraine, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Mary of Scotland circa 1102, nel Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 25 gennaio 1125, nel Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eustache III de Boulogneが約1058年1月にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードルミリ-エン-カンブルeシスで生まれた時，父Eustache II de Boulogneは39歳，母Ide de Lorraineは29歳であった。約1102年にフランスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーでMary of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1125年1月25日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eustache III de Boulogne(이)가 대략 1058년 1월 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 럼이리--캄브e시스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eustache II de Boulogne(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Ide de Lorraine(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1102년 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에서 Mary of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1125년 1월 25일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.ABT JAN 1058–25 January 1125: tany ho any amin'ny janoary 1058–25 janoary 1125

mn.ABT JAN 1058–25 January 1125: ойролцоогоор 1058 оны Нэгдүгээр сар–1125 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 25

pt.ABT JAN 1058–25 January 1125: aproximadamente janeiro de 1058–25 de janeiro de 1125
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eustache III de Boulogne nasceu aproximadamente janeiro de 1058, em Rumilly-en-Cambrésis, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Eustache II de Boulogne, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Ide de Lorraine, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary of Scotland aproximadamente 1102, em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de janeiro de 1125, em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eustache III de Boulogne родился около январь 1058 г. в местности румилли-ен-камбрeсис, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Eustache II de Boulogne было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Ide de Lorraine, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary of Scotland около 1102 г. в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 25 января 1125 г. в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 67 лет.

sm.ABT JAN 1058–25 January 1125: e tusa o le Ianuari 1058–25 Ianuari 1125
sm.from 1088 to 1125: mai le 1088 e o'o I le 1125

es.ABT JAN 1058–25 January 1125: aproximadamente enero de 1058–25 de enero de 1125
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eustache III de Boulogne nació aproximadamente enero de 1058, en Rumilly-en-Cambrésis, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Eustache II de Boulogne, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Ide de Lorraine, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Mary of Scotland aproximadamente 1102, en Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 25 de enero de 1125, en Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 67 años.
